title: Find the Team Size
description: For each employee, find the size of the team they belong to.
constraints: Every employee belongs to exactly one team (team_id is NOT NULL)
key_concept: Subquery count per group, joined back to each row.

hints.L1: Count employees per team. Join that count back to each employee row.
hints.L2: Subquery: SELECT team_id, COUNT(*) AS team_size FROM Employee GROUP BY team_id. Then join to Employee on team_id.
hints.L3: SELECT e.employee_id, t.team_size FROM Employee e JOIN (SELECT team_id, COUNT(*) AS team_size FROM Employee GROUP BY team_id) t ON e.team_id = t.team_id
